excluded_source.reason: The page offers attachment ideas but no anchor-integrity or load check, so no unstated safety rule was inferred.
Its prerequisite navigation duplicates the existing Spring curriculum row.
Its navigation is redundant and its catalog includes unsafe self-choking and other high-risk prompts.

method.authoring: manual full-source review and hand-authored Q&A
method.collision_scope: v308 train-only projection; sealed collisions delegated to integration tooling
method.selection: three distinct learning lessons from one fully reviewed new document; counted as one conservative conflict unit
